message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "UI" as UI #LightBlue200
box "" #WhiteSmoke
  participant sessionRoute #LightPurple150
end box
actor passport #LavenderBlush3
entity SessionController #Thistle4
database innoDB #AliceBlue


== == 
activate UI 

note over UI : GET() "/session"\nAuth: Bearer token\n{userID, DASS21_SCORES,\nsessionDetails} 


alt [Success: Authenticated]  
    activate sessionRoute
    
     note right of sessionRoute:"/save", authenticate("jwt") 
    
      alt[Failure: Unauthorized ]   
        deactivate passport
        
         done(null,false) <--passport 
        
          http Response(401)\nUnauthorized ..> UI
      
       else    
        
            done(null,user)<--passport
            
             Request Products -->SessionController 
            
              Validate info ->>+SessionController
                
                saveSession()->+innoDB
                    
                    return session
                        
                        httpResponse(200)\nsession-->-sessionRoute
                        
                            httpRequestResponse(UI,"allProducts","httpResponse(200)")
                            
                                end if     
                                
                                      
                                    elseif [ Failure: missing information]
                                    
                                        {"msg":"missing required \ninformation"}(400)..>-sessionRoute
                                        
                                            http Response(400){\n\"msg\":\"missing required information\"\n}\n..>--UI
                                            
                                                endif
                                                
                                                    end
@enduml
